scriptLines:
query: 'SELECT 
    TRY_CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(fecha_control AS DATE), 112) AS INT) AS fecha_key,
    ci_beneficiaria,
    NULL AS ci_infante,
    (SELECT TOP 1 codigo_snis FROM bja_establecimientos_salud_silver WHERE establecimiento_id = t.establecimiento_id) AS codigo_snis,
    NULL AS sigla_caja,
    NULL AS nit_empleador,
    NULL AS nombre_canal,
    'Control Prenatal - BJA' AS nombre_evento,
    'Clinico' AS categoria_evento,
    NULL AS nro_matricula_asegurado,
    NULL AS nro_comprobante_pago,
    semana_gestacion,
    nro_control,
    CAST(peso_madre_kg AS DECIMAL(5,2)) AS peso_madre_kg,
    0.00 AS monto_asignado_bs
FROM bja_controles_prenatales_silver t

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    TRY_CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(fecha_control AS DATE), 112) AS INT) AS fecha_key,
    ci_beneficiaria,
    NULL AS ci_infante,
    (SELECT TOP 1 codigo_snis FROM sup_establecimientos_silver WHERE establecimiento_id = t.establecimiento_id) AS codigo_snis,
    NULL AS sigla_caja,
    NULL AS nit_empleador,
    NULL AS nombre_canal,
    'Control Prenatal - SUP' AS nombre_evento,
    'Clinico' AS categoria_evento,
    NULL AS nro_matricula_asegurado,
    NULL AS nro_comprobante_pago,
    semana_gestacion,
    nro_control,
    CAST(peso_madre_kg AS DECIMAL(5,2)) AS peso_madre_kg,
    0.00 AS monto_asignado_bs
FROM sup_controles_silver t

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    TRY_CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(fecha_control AS DATE), 112) AS INT) AS fecha_key,
    ci_madre AS ci_beneficiaria,
    ci_nino AS ci_infante,
    (SELECT TOP 1 codigo_snis FROM bja_establecimientos_salud_silver WHERE establecimiento_id = t.establecimiento_id) AS codigo_snis,
    NULL AS sigla_caja,
    NULL AS nit_empleador,
    NULL AS nombre_canal,
    'Control Pediatrico' AS nombre_evento,
    'Clinico' AS categoria_evento,
    NULL AS nro_matricula_asegurado,
    NULL AS nro_comprobante_pago,
    NULL AS semana_gestacion,
    TRY_CAST(nro_control AS INT) AS nro_control,
    NULL AS peso_madre_kg,
    0.00 AS monto_asignado_bs
FROM bja_controles_pediatricos_silver t

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    TRY_CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(fecha_parto AS DATE), 112) AS INT) AS fecha_key,
    ci_madre AS ci_beneficiaria,
    ci_recien_nacido AS ci_infante,
    (SELECT TOP 1 codigo_snis FROM bja_establecimientos_salud_silver WHERE establecimiento_id = t.establecimiento_id) AS codigo_snis,
    NULL AS sigla_caja,
    NULL AS nit_empleador,
    NULL AS nombre_canal,
    'Parto' AS nombre_evento,
    'Clinico' AS categoria_evento,
    NULL AS nro_matricula_asegurado,
    NULL AS nro_comprobante_pago,
    NULL AS semana_gestacion,
    NULL AS nro_control,
    NULL AS peso_madre_kg,
    0.00 AS monto_asignado_bs
FROM bja_partos_silver t

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    TRY_CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(fecha_pago AS DATE), 112) AS INT) AS fecha_key,
    ci_beneficiaria,
    NULL AS ci_infante,
    NULL AS codigo_snis,
    NULL AS sigla_caja,
    NULL AS nit_empleador,
    canal_pago AS nombre_canal,
    'Pago Bono' AS nombre_evento,
    'Financiero' AS categoria_evento,
    NULL AS nro_matricula_asegurado,
    nro_comprobante AS nro_comprobante_pago,
    NULL AS semana_gestacion,
    NULL AS nro_control,
    NULL AS peso_madre_kg,
    CAST(monto_bs AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS monto_asignado_bs
FROM bja_pagos_silver t

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    TRY_CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(fecha_afiliacion AS DATE), 112) AS INT) AS fecha_key,
    ci_beneficiaria,
    NULL AS ci_infante,
    NULL AS codigo_snis,
    (SELECT TOP 1 sigla FROM spl_cajas_salud_silver WHERE caja_id = t.caja_id) AS sigla_caja,
    CAST((SELECT TOP 1 nit FROM spl_empleadores_silver WHERE empleador_id = t.empleador_id) AS VARCHAR(50)) AS nit_empleador,
    NULL AS nombre_canal,
    'Afiliacion' AS nombre_evento,
    'Clinico' AS categoria_evento,
    nro_matricula AS nro_matricula_asegurado,
    NULL AS nro_comprobante_pago,
    NULL AS semana_gestacion,
    NULL AS nro_control,
    NULL AS peso_madre_kg,
    0.00 AS monto_asignado_bs
FROM spl_afiliaciones_silver t

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    TRY_CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(fecha_inscripcion AS DATE), 112) AS INT) AS fecha_key,
    ci_beneficiaria,
    NULL AS ci_infante,
    (SELECT TOP 1 codigo_snis FROM bja_establecimientos_salud_silver WHERE establecimiento_id = t.establecimiento_id) AS codigo_snis,
    NULL AS sigla_caja,
    NULL AS nit_empleador,
    NULL AS nombre_canal,
    'Inscripcion Programa - BJA' AS nombre_evento,
    'Clinico' AS categoria_evento,
    NULL AS nro_matricula_asegurado,
    NULL AS nro_comprobante_pago,
    semana_gestacion,
    NULL AS nro_control,
    NULL AS peso_madre_kg,
    0.00 AS monto_asignado_bs
FROM bja_inscripciones_silver t

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    TRY_CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(fecha_inscripcion AS DATE), 112) AS INT) AS fecha_key,
    ci_beneficiaria,
    NULL AS ci_infante,
    (SELECT TOP 1 codigo_snis FROM sup_establecimientos_silver WHERE establecimiento_id = t.establecimiento_id) AS codigo_snis,
    NULL AS sigla_caja,
    NULL AS nit_empleador,
    NULL AS nombre_canal,
    'Inscripcion Programa - SUP' AS nombre_evento,
    'Clinico' AS categoria_evento,
    NULL AS nro_matricula_asegurado,
    NULL AS nro_comprobante_pago,
    semana_gestacion,
    NULL AS nro_control,
    NULL AS peso_madre_kg,
    0.00 AS monto_asignado_bs
FROM sup_inscripciones_silver t',
